subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath been received, and likewise the printed copies enclosed therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مرقوم وصول یافت و همچنین نسخ مطبوعه ملفوف فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @non-participation in politics, @review of publications, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @universality of the Cause
